# Coming Soon Templates

The following templates are currently in development:

## Frost Theme

Glassmorphism light theme with blur effects. Coming to:
- Next.js
- React
- HTML

## Mono Theme

Minimal monochrome typography-driven design. Coming to:
- Next.js
- React
- HTML

## Get Notified

Star the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/FaizyabHussain07/slik-engine) to get notified when new templates are released.
